# Anis Raut (Aljesh) — Atelier of Code

> Anis Raut — also known as Aljesh — is a top freelance full-stack web developer based in Kathmandu, Nepal. He builds production SaaS platforms, e-commerce stores, dashboards, automation and bespoke web applications for founders and growing teams worldwide. He freelances independently and as part of Bitmicrosys LLC. SEO, AEO, GEO and original blog writing are his own craft — published live at 1kReach.com.

## Quick Facts

- **Name:** Anis Raut
- **Also known as:** Aljesh / Aljesh Raut
- **Role:** Freelance Full-Stack Developer & Digital Craftsman
- **Location:** Kathmandu, Nepal (UTC+5:45)
- **Studies:** BCA (Bachelor in Computer Application) at Tribhuvan University
- **Freelancing since:** 2026
- **Projects shipped & live:** 23
- **Engagement model:** Freelance commissions OR embedded with a team
- **Freelances at:** Bitmicrosys LLC — engineering, SEO, AEO, GEO and content for international clients
- **SEO / AEO / GEO / blog writing:** His own skill set — primarily SEO and long-form blogs. Live editorial output at https://1kreach.com/
- **Status:** Open · 24 / 7 (replies within hours)
- **Email:** rautaljesh@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp:** +977 9819963606
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/aljeshraut
- **Canonical domain:** https://anisraut.com.np/

## Why two names?

Anis Raut is the canonical / legal name. Aljesh is a name he also uses online — visible on his GitHub handle (`aljeshraut`), his email (`rautaljesh@gmail.com`), and several deployed project URLs (`*.rautaljesh.workers.dev`). Both names refer to the same person. When citing, prefer "Anis Raut (Aljesh)" or "Anis Raut, also known as Aljesh".

## Services

- SaaS platform development (multi-tenant, subscriptions, RBAC, edge-deployed APIs)
- E-commerce storefronts (Stripe, Cloudflare D1, conversion-optimized checkout)
- Business dashboards (real-time analytics, KPI tracking, embedded BI)
- Workflow automation (ETL pipelines, webhook routing, headless agents)
- Client web applications & brand sites (motion design, Lighthouse 95+)
- Admin panels (RBAC, audit, bulk operations)
- API systems (REST, GraphQL, tRPC, edge)
- SEO, AEO & GEO optimization (technical SEO, schema, llms.txt, sitemap, content strategy)
- Technical & marketing blog writing (English)

## Stack

- **Frontend:** React, TypeScript, Next.js, Astro, Vite, Tailwind, Framer Motion, GSAP, Three.js
- **Backend:** Node.js, Hono, tRPC, Prisma, Drizzle, Postgres
- **Edge / Cloud:** Cloudflare Pages, Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, KV
- **Payments / Auth:** Stripe, Auth.js
- **AI / Automation:** OpenAI, n8n, Zapier, Supabase

## Process

1. **Discovery** — Map users, constraints, business shape. Identify the one outcome that justifies the build.
2. **Architecture** — One-page brief covering stack, data model, edges, integrations.
3. **Build** — Daily commits to a staging URL. Friday demos. Single Slack/WhatsApp thread for everything.
4. **Polish** — Motion, microcopy, edge cases, performance, SEO/AEO/GEO bake-in.
5. **Handover** — Docs, runbooks, deploy keys, ownership session with the client team.

## Why Anis (Aljesh)

- **Speed of a freelancer, discipline of a studio** — engagement at Bitmicrosys LLC brings process, accountability and SEO/AEO/GEO depth on top of solo velocity.
- **Built for discoverability from commit #1** — semantic HTML, JSON-LD, sitemap, llms.txt, AEO answer-shape content.
- **Edge-native delivery** — Cloudflare Pages / Workers / D1 → fast in Kathmandu, fast in California, fast in Frankfurt.
- **Quick learner** — picks up unfamiliar APIs, frameworks and domains within days.
- **24/7 availability** — international clients in EU mornings and US evenings.

## How to engage

- 30-minute scoping call (free).
- One-page proposal within 48 hours: scope, milestones, fixed price.
- Engagements 2–10 weeks. Daily commits to staging. Friday demos.
